title: AI tool helps users select Edge AI hardware
description: A new tool helps users match AI models with Edge AI hardware, reducing the time needed to compare different system options. ASRock Industrial has launched AI Pathfinder, an online tool that helps users choose Edge AI hardware based on the AI model, workload, and deployment requirements. The tool supports more than 21 AI models, including [...]

title: From Experiment to Infrastructure: The Scaling of Enterprise Voice AI
description: The global landscape of artificial intelligence is undergoing a critical shift as enterprise adoption moves rapidly from text-based interfaces to intuitive, voice-first infrastructure. While Western markets have heavily favored conversational text and chatbots, India’s unique demographic profile—marked by over one billion mobile users across diverse regional languages and varying literacy levels—is positioning the country as [...] The post From Experiment to Infrastructure: The Scaling of Enterprise Voice AI appeared first on CXOToday.com .

title: AI Names & Ranks 15 Greatest Heavyweight Boxers in History
description: AI has ranked the 15 greatest heavyweight boxers in history, and the legend that is Mike Tyson only just makes the top 10.

title: Concentration Risk Rises As Private Equity Pours Billions Into AI
description: Global private equity and venture capital firms are increasingly betting on large AI funding rounds, which may expose limited partners to unintended concentration risk.
